detail.description:
A Failing Sect, Is ‘Me’ the Last Hope?!

You suddenly find yourself in the Murim one day.

When you open your eyes… the sect is already on the verge of collapse?!

The sect leader is gone, there are no disciples,

and only I remain.

Now, the fate of the sect rests on your choices and growth!

▣Game Introduction▣

▶ Outrageous and bizarre martial arts; they get stronger the more you combine them!

Moonlight Sword Technique, Oppa Gangnam Skill… A full lineup of martial arts with suspicious names!
